mapper.select: SELECT t1.ID, t1.ALLOCATE_CODE, t1.TITLE, t1.FROM_COMPANY_ID, t1.FROM_COMPANY_NAME, t1.FROM_WAREHOUSE_ID, t1.FROM_WAREHOUSE_NAME, t1.TO_COMPANY_ID, t1.TO_COMPANY_NAME, t1.TO_WAREHOUSE_ID, t1.TO_WAREHOUSE_NAME, t1.ALLOCATE_TIME, t1.APPLY_USER, t1.APPLY_USER_NAME, t1.APPLY_REASON, t1.EXECUTE_STATUS, t1.EXECUTE_MSG, t1.EXECUTE_TIME, t1.EXECUTE_USER, t1.EXECUTE_USER_NAME, t1.OUT_WAREHOUSE_ID, t1.OUT_WAREHOUSE_NO, t1.IN_WAREHOUSE_ID, t1.IN_WAREHOUSE_NO, t1.REMARKS, t1.CREATE_BY, t1.CREATE_BY_NAME, t1.CREATE_TIME, t1.UPDATE_BY, t1.UPDATE_BY_NAME, t1.UPDATE_TIME, t3.PROC_INST_ID, CASE WHEN t3.INSTANCE_STATUS IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE t3.INSTANCE_STATUS END AS processStatus, CASE WHEN t2.DICT_LABEL IS NULL THEN '未发起' ELSE t2.DICT_LABEL END AS processStatusLabel FROM E_M_MAT_ALLOCATE t1 LEFT JOIN BPM_BUSINESS_INSTANCE t3 ON t3.BUSINESS_DATA_ID = t1.ID LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA t2 ON t2.DICT_VALUE = t3.INSTANCE_STATUS AND t2.DICT_TYPE = 'APPROVAL_STATUS' WHERE t1.ID = #{id}

SELECT ID, ALLOCATE_CODE, TITLE, FROM_COMPANY_ID, FROM_COMPANY_NAME, FROM_WAREHOUSE_ID, FROM_WAREHOUSE_NAME, TO_COMPANY_ID, TO_COMPANY_NAME, TO_WAREHOUSE_ID, TO_WAREHOUSE_NAME, ALLOCATE_TIME, APPLY_USER, APPLY_USER_NAME, APPLY_REASON, EXECUTE_STATUS, EXECUTE_MSG, EXECUTE_TIME, EXECUTE_USER, EXECUTE_USER_NAME, OUT_WAREHOUSE_ID, OUT_WAREHOUSE_NO, IN_WAREHOUSE_ID, IN_WAREHOUSE_NO, REMARKS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM E_M_MAT_ALLOCATE WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_M_MAT_ALLOCATE ( ID, ALLOCATE_CODE, TITLE, FROM_COMPANY_ID, FROM_COMPANY_NAME, FROM_WAREHOUSE_ID, FROM_WAREHOUSE_NAME, TO_COMPANY_ID, TO_COMPANY_NAME, TO_WAREHOUSE_ID, TO_WAREHOUSE_NAME, ALLOCATE_TIME, APPLY_USER, APPLY_USER_NAME, APPLY_REASON, EXECUTE_STATUS, EXECUTE_MSG, EXECUTE_TIME, EXECUTE_USER, EXECUTE_USER_NAME, OUT_WAREHOUSE_ID, OUT_WAREHOUSE_NO, IN_WAREHOUSE_ID, IN_WAREHOUSE_NO, REMARKS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{allocateCode}, #{title}, #{fromCompanyId}, #{fromCompanyName}, #{fromWarehouseId}, #{fromWarehouseName}, #{toCompanyId}, #{toCompanyName}, #{toWarehouseId}, #{toWarehouseName}, #{allocateTime}, #{applyUser}, #{applyUserName}, #{applyReason}, #{executeStatus}, #{executeMsg}, #{executeTime}, #{executeUser}, #{executeUserName}, #{outWarehouseId}, #{outWarehouseNo}, #{inWarehouseId}, #{inWarehouseNo}, #{remarks}, #{createBy}, #{createByName}, #{createTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT BUSINESS_DATA_ID FROM BPM_BUSINESS_INSTANCE WHERE PROC_INST_ID = #{processInstanceId}
